headline: Landing Page Copy Strategy with 3 Google Ads-Aligned Variants, Social Proof Framework & Form Optimization
highlights: Variant A: Time Savings Hero - 'Reclaim 6 Hours/Week' with focus on time ROI and workload relief
Variant B: Accuracy Assurance - 'Eliminate Reporting Errors' with emphasis on precision and client trust
Variant C: Visualization Hero - 'Interactive Dashboards Clients Love' with focus on engagement and agency differentiation
Social Proof Framework: Logo placement strategy, stat blocks, testimonials, and trust messaging for each variant
Form Strategy: 3-4 field optimization with variant-specific questions to improve conversion and segmentation
CTA Button Copy Matrix: 9 unique button texts mapped to each variant's primary motivation and buyer journey
Google Ads Alignment: Keyword-to-variant mapping, Quality Score optimization, ad headline-to-landing page sync
Success Metrics: Target form completion rate 8-12%, trial activation 60%+, variant differentiation ≥2%
Implementation Checklist: 40+ tasks across design, copy, technical, testing, and analytics phases
Risk Mitigation: 4 key risks identified with contingency plans (low form rates, activation issues, variant underperformance, ad quality)
Complete 7-day A/B test framework with decision rules and winner declaration criteria at 100 submissions per variant
Appendix: Industry benchmarks, pain point sources, competitive pricing, and time value calculations
